name: Cash Now Pawn Shop
description_short: Cash Now Pawn Shop at 1186 Bay St, Staten Island offers collateral-based lending and pawn services with extended weekday hours and accessible storefront amenities.
description_long:
Cash Now Pawn Shop operates as a traditional pawn operation located in the Tompkinsville neighborhood of Staten Island, New York. The shop has established itself as a local provider of quick cash solutions for residents needing immediate liquidity against personal valuables. The business maintains a physical retail location designed to serve walk-in customers seeking fast transactions without credit checks or lengthy approval processes.

The company offers pawn lending services where customers can exchange items of value for immediate cash. Standard pawn shop services include accepting a wide range of collateral items and providing short-term loans secured by those items. The storefront is equipped to handle transactions during extended business hours, operating from 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM daily, seven days a week, making services accessible to customers with varying schedules.

Cash Now distinguishes itself through customer-focused facility amenities. The location features air conditioning for customer comfort, accessible restrooms, wheelchair accessibility for mobility-challenged customers, and accepts credit card payments for added convenience. These features represent an investment in customer experience beyond basic pawn shop operations. The shop maintains an active phone line for customer inquiries at (718) 420-1078.

As a pawn shop, Cash Now Pawn Shop serves individuals needing immediate short-term financing without credit evaluation, making it accessible to those with poor or no credit history. However, potential customers should understand that pawn loans carry the risk of losing collateral if loans are not repaid, and interest rates on pawn transactions typically exceed traditional lending options. The service model is transactional rather than relationship-based, and items left as collateral will be forfeited and resold if redemption terms are not met.
pros: Extended operating hours (10 AM - 8 PM daily) provide accessibility for working customers
Wheelchair accessible location accommodates customers with mobility needs
Accepts credit card payments alongside cash transactions for customer convenience
Onsite restroom facilities available for customer use
Air-conditioned storefront ensures comfortable transaction environment
No credit check or application process required for pawn loans
Immediate cash available same-day upon collateral evaluation
cons: Risk of losing collateral permanently if loan is not repaid within agreed timeframe
Pawn loan interest rates and fees typically significantly exceed bank or credit union rates
Limited information available about specific loan terms, rates, or maximum loan amounts
Transaction-based model does not build credit history or establish lending relationships
Website provides no details about item valuation methodology or loan-to-value ratios
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000) without credit approval
People with poor credit history or no established credit who cannot qualify for traditional loans
Customers with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they can temporarily part with
Those facing short-term emergency cash needs and planning to reclaim collateral quickly
diagnosis: Cash Now Pawn Shop is best for Staten Island residents experiencing immediate cash needs who have valuable collateral and cannot qualify for traditional credit products. The primary caveat is that customers risk permanently losing their pledged items if they cannot repay the loan within the agreed term, and pawn interest rates substantially exceed conventional lending options.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal valuables
Item redemption and loan repayment services
